reference: Hi, I was pregnant last year and I had a missed abortion. After a certain period of time, we are planning to have a baby. After my last period, on day two, I underwent a follicle test. The doctor suggested taking Clomiphene tablets for five days and they injected a trigger injection to rupture the egg. After that, we just tried naturally. So what is the percentage of getting pregnant now?
text: hi i was pregnant last year and i had a missed abortion after a certain period of time we are planning to have a baby after my last period on day two i underwent a follicle test the doctor suggested taking clomiphene tablets for five days and they injected a trigger injection to rupture the egg after that we just tried naturally so what is the percentage of getting pregnant now
